description: Product Description Thigh High Socks That Combine Comfort, Style & Versatility From everyday wear to special occasions, our over the knee cotton socks are designed for women & girls who want fashion that feels as good as it looks. Bold & Trendy Pattern Stand out with stylish checkerboard thigh high socks. Perfect for casual wear, cosplay, or school uniforms. Soft, Stretchy & Stay-Put Made from 80% Cotton, 18% Polyamide, 2% Elastane. Stretchy thigh high socks stay put for everyday wear or layered styling. Classic & Versatile Design Classic knee high socks pair perfectly with skirts, dresses, leggings, or boots. Comfortable and versatile for casual wear. Playful & Colourful Style Fun argyle patterned thigh high socks in multiple colours. Perfect for cosplay, school events, or everyday wear. Versatile Style Perfect as boot socks, leg warmers, fashion stockings, cosplay or school socks – endless styling possibilities. Stay-Put Fit Our long over the knee design stays securely over the knee without slipping. Fashion Meets Everyday Comfort Upgrade your look with over the knee socks that are as stylish as they are practical. Pair them with skirts, dresses, school uniforms, or cosplay costumes. Wear them as warm boot stockings in winter or as lightweight leg warmers for sports and dancing. With plain and striped designs in multiple colours, they’re a wardrobe essential for every season. Your Style. Your Comfort. Your Socks. Whether you’re dressing for a party, cosplay event, school day or everyday outing, our socks give you the perfect blend of style, warmth and comfort.
